name: White Chocolate Egg Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the white chocolate syrup: Melt 3 ounces of white chocolate with 1/4 cup of light corn syrup and 2 tablespoons of orange juice according to the directions in the Chocolate Key. Whisk until smooth and cool to a tepid temperature.
2. Assemble the egg creams: Pour 1 cup of milk into a 12-ounce glass. Top with a spritz of seltzer so that the white foam reaches the top of the glass. Place a spoon in the glass. Slowly pour 3 tablespoons of the white chocolate syrup into the glass, aiming for the bottom of the spoon if possible. Stir quickly to blend without deflating the foam. Repeat for another egg cream.
3. Serve immediately.
PREPARATION: 15 minutes plus cooling time
